records.metric_name: Hayward M7.05 displaced households / short-term shelter
records.source_document: Draft Oakland 2026-2031 Local Hazard Mitigation Plan
records.source_table: Table 9-6. Estimated Earthquake Impact on Persons and Households
records.limitations: Sub-area displacement estimates are community planning context and do not predict address-level earthquake damage.

records.source_document: Draft Oakland 2026-2031 Local Hazard Mitigation Plan
records.source_table: Table 9-7. Estimated Number of Equity Priority Community Members Exposed to Earthquake
records.limitations: Zero EPC exposure is not a zero-earthquake-risk finding and must not lower earthquake priority.

records.source_document: Draft Oakland 2026-2031 Local Hazard Mitigation Plan
records.source_table: Table 9-7. Estimated Number of Equity Priority Community Members Exposed to Earthquake
records.limitations: EPC exposure describes community vulnerability context and does not determine personal risk.

records.metric_name: 1% and 0.2% annual chance flood displaced households / short-term shelter
records.source_document: Draft Oakland 2026-2031 Local Hazard Mitigation Plan
records.source_table: Table 10-7. Estimated Flood Impact on Persons and Households
records.source_reference: FEMA 2018; City of Oakland 2017; City of Oakland 2025
records.limitations: Sub-area flood impact estimates do not replace address-specific FEMA/local flood-zone intersection results.

records.metric_name: 1% and 0.2% annual chance flood displaced households / short-term shelter
records.source_document: Draft Oakland 2026-2031 Local Hazard Mitigation Plan
records.source_table: Table 10-7. Estimated Flood Impact on Persons and Households
records.source_reference: FEMA 2018; City of Oakland 2017; City of Oakland 2025
records.limitations: A zero in one flood scenario does not mean no flood hazard; use official address-specific flood-zone results when available.

records.metric_name: EPC population exposed to 1% and 0.2% annual chance flood
records.source_document: Draft Oakland 2026-2031 Local Hazard Mitigation Plan
records.source_table: Tables 10-8 and 10-9. EPC Members Exposed to Flood
records.source_reference: FEMA 2018; City of Oakland 2017; City of Oakland 2023
records.limitations: EPC exposure values are community context only and do not assign a property flood rating.

records.metric_name: Population in high / very high landslide susceptibility areas
records.source_document: Draft Oakland 2026-2031 Local Hazard Mitigation Plan
records.source_table: Table 11-4. Estimated Number of Persons Located in High and Very High Landslide Susceptibility Areas
records.source_reference: CGS n.d.; City of Oakland 2025; Hazus v6.1 2023
records.limitations: Sub-area susceptibility exposure is planning context; address-specific mapped landslide evidence controls local mapped concern.

records.metric_name: EPC population exposed to combined high and very high landslide susceptibility
records.source_document: Draft Oakland 2026-2031 Local Hazard Mitigation Plan
records.source_table: Table 11-5. Estimated Number of EPC Members Exposed to Landslide
records.source_reference: City of Oakland 2023; CGS n.d.; City of Oakland 2025; Hazus v6.1 2023
records.limitations: EPC exposure describes community context and does not change landslide probability.

records.metric_name: Population exposed and displaced households / short-term shelter in tsunami hazard area
records.source_document: Draft Oakland 2026-2031 Local Hazard Mitigation Plan
records.source_table: Tables 14-2 and 14-3. Tsunami Population and Household Impact
records.source_reference: CGS 2025; City of Oakland 2025; FEMA 2018; Hazus v6.1 2023
records.limitations: Sub-area tsunami exposure supports community context; address-specific tsunami hazard-area intersection controls local mapped concern.

records.source_document: Draft Oakland 2026-2031 Local Hazard Mitigation Plan
records.source_table: Table 14-4. Estimated Number of EPC Members Exposed to Tsunami
records.limitations: Zero EPC exposure does not prove no tsunami impact; address-specific official tsunami mapping is required.

records.metric_name: Population living in the Very High FHSZ
records.source_document: Draft Oakland 2026-2031 Local Hazard Mitigation Plan
records.source_table: Table 15-5. Estimated Number of Persons Living in the Very High FHSZ
records.source_reference: CAL FIRE 2025a; City of Oakland 2025; Hazus v6.1 2023
records.limitations: Very High FHSZ exposure is severity/exposure context and is not an annual probability estimate.

records.metric_name: EPC population exposed to wildfire in FHSZ buffer area
records.source_document: Draft Oakland 2026-2031 Local Hazard Mitigation Plan
records.source_table: Table 15-6. Estimated Number of EPC Members Exposed to Wildfire in FHSZ Buffer Area
records.limitations: EPC wildfire-buffer context does not determine local wildfire mapped concern; use official FHSZ results.

records.metric_name: Population living in the Very High FHSZ
records.source_document: Draft Oakland 2026-2031 Local Hazard Mitigation Plan
records.source_table: Table 15-5. Estimated Number of Persons Living in the Very High FHSZ
records.source_reference: CAL FIRE 2025a; City of Oakland 2025; Hazus v6.1 2023
